cover_letter: I am excited to apply for the role at GeistM. As a senior at Indiana University?s Kelley School of Business, dual majoring in Marketing and International Business, I have combined my love for marketing strategy with a deep curiosity for how brands connect across cultures. My internships in both the U.S. and abroad, along with immersive academic experiences in South Africa and Hungary, have shaped my ability to craft creative, data-informed campaigns that resonate with diverse audiences. Most recently, as a Marketing Intern with Schmidt Brothers in New York City, I developed personas and creative assets for a Back-to-School campaign, modernized 80+ product descriptions for SEO and clarity, and produced social content to grow engagement. I also analyzed eCommerce performance across Shopify, Amazon Marketplace, and Google Analytics, translating data into strategies for the holiday season. Previously, at Impact Hub Berlin, I designed multi-channel campaigns and leveraged HubSpot CRM to segment and target audiences for increased event participation. Whether leading a cross-functional capstone team to launch a go-to-market strategy or researching generational purchasing behavior, I thrive in environments where I can merge creative problem-solving with a global perspective.
extra_context: Strong marketing student targeting NYC full-time roles with direct internship proof in content, campaigns, analytics, and eCommerce.
jobText: GeistM is a global full-funnel performance marketing company. We are seeking a Growth Marketing Analyst to join our Strategic Growth Team. In this role, you will help develop new concepts and strategies to drive client campaign performance across core advertising networks. You?ll work on content ideation, campaign optimization, data analysis, testing, and reporting, all with the goal of improving performance and scaling client accounts. What You?ll Do: Research, source, and manage marketing assets across multiple client verticals. Analyze campaign performance and generate actionable insights that support optimization and scale. Assist in developing content and creative concepts based on performance data and emerging trends. Execute campaign optimizations, define KPIs, and support structured testing across platforms. Manage and optimize campaigns across channels such as Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Snapchat, X, Reddit, Taboola, and more. Support A/B testing initiatives including hypothesis development, setup, and interpreting results. Monitor pacing, performance shifts, and delivery trends to identify opportunities for growth. Prepare reports and performance summaries that translate data into clear narratives and recommendations. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support creative development and strategic planning. What You Should Have: Bachelor?s degree in Marketing, Business, Economics, Communications, or related field. 0?2 years of experience in digital marketing, growth marketing, or a related internship. Strong analytical skills with experience using Microsoft Excel; comfort working with data sets, pivot tables, and formulas. Familiarity with digital advertising concepts such as CTR, CVR, ROAS, CAC, and marketing funnels. Interest in testing frameworks and data-driven experimentation. Strong written and verbal communication skills. Ability to manage multiple priorities, stay organized, and thrive in a fast-paced environment. Curiosity about how creative assets and messaging impact performance. Eagerness to explore AI tools that support creative ideation and campaign analysis. Location: NYC, hybrid with 1 required in-office day per week.
